saifsoomro63/Water-Quality-Analysis-and-Pollution-Classification
entries.snippet: Stars:0 | This project leverages unsupervised machine learning to analyze and classify water samples based on various physicochemical quality indicators. By applying K-Means clustering, the project categorizes water samples into distinct pollution levels, providing actionable insights for environmental management and resource protection.
